title: Vital Quick British Turkey Ham Ploughmans
description: A fresh and quick British dish featuring turkey ham and steamed vegetables, perfect for a light lunch or snack, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Fill a large pot with 2 inches of water and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and place a steamer basket over the pot.
Add the sliced carrots to the steamer basket and cover with a lid.
Steam the carrots for 5 minutes, or until they are tender but still crisp.
While the carrots are steaming, slice the turkey ham into thin strips.
In a small bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar and olive oil.
Add the sliced cucumber and cherry tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
To assemble the ploughmans, place a slice of turkey ham on a plate, then top with a spoonful of the steamed carrots, a handful of mixed greens, and a spoonful of the cucumber and tomato mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
